name: Republic Note

issuer.name: Republic Capital Group
issuer.type: Delaware LLC + US-registered broker dealer affiliate

regulator.name: US SEC (Reg CF, Reg A, Reg D offerings)

summary: Profit-participation token entitling holders to dividends from cashflows generated by deals on Republic's investment platform (crowdfunded equity, venture-backed startups, real estate, crypto fundraising). Effectively tokenized exposure to Republic's deal-flow economics. Significant as one of the first SEC-compliant profit-participation tokens (Reg D + Reg S structure). Distributions paid in USDC; tied to actual platform revenue including exits and secondary sales.
underlying_asset: Profit participation rights in Republic's deal-flow cashflows (success fees, carry, secondary sale proceeds).
reserve_composition: No reserve — dividends paid from actual platform revenue when realized.
secondary_market: Republic ATS for token holders; OTC transfers subject to KYC whitelist.
redemption_mechanism: No principal redemption; dividend payments in USDC when triggered by underlying cashflows.

timeline.event: Republic ATS launched for secondary trading
